reviews.review_description: How do you I get past the part with the candles also if anyone knows how to get past it plz let me know

developer_response.body:
Look at the time on the clock in the hallway.
Now...
Light two candles so that the shadows on the floor match the right time.

reviews.review_description: After Dark Days , you guys came with this ( developers) ??!! Can't help my self but the game didn't make sense!! The story (specially in cellar) ... just walk this way,  pick something,  go that way and for no reason,  suddenly,  doors open elsewhere,  tragic!! Nowadays players wants much more, like interact with characters ( i want to hear what i need to do, i want hint) something what suck me into the story!  Graphics was ok, but again " details " !! In a cellar, water pump, no hose connect it with water! Very confusing,  what to do in game! I was looking for missing parts of water pump or so... in first 20 min ! The game is very short and looks incomplete, not polished,  like a beta version !! All over Disappointment!

Really good graphics and i dont say that very often esp for VR u did an awesome job on that + how immersive the game is but i give it a 4 stars just because there arnt allot of jump scares...the halls u walk u could just put allot more scare jumps in them and then it would be a nightmare to play it :D but overal its a good game.keep the good work!
Sorry but its not scary
Walk slowly and look for keys. Boring.

developer_response.body: Do you have finished the game? If not, we invite you to play more. There are many other things to discover: enemies, puzzles and new areas. Thanks anyway.

reviews.review_description: It is really nice but you need to put compatibility with gear vr control for better experience

developer_response.body:
****Gamepad and Gear VR motion controller added to the new version 1.1****

Thanks so much!!!

reviews.review_description: Pretty nice graphics. A few puzzles. Also a few jumpscares. Shorter than normal.
Devs Can you please send me the candles solution mnopwxy@yahoo.fr thank you
I need help on the candles. Im stuck! I dont get the shadow part. Help!

developer_response.body: Look at the time on the clocks, light the candles and look at the shadows on the floor. Have fun!!!

reviews.review_description: Nice game.
I did a review of this game on my channel YouTube.com/UrGamingTechie In short this is a great game for horror fans. Relies on Atmosphere not jump scares. Fun time

But...child behind the Wall triggers just the first Time. Second time or from other directions didn't Work. 

A more spooky game with this graphics may be more relaxing and better suited for bigger crowd.

A Second option with gamepad would be great. The Running from enemies is Not well suited with the Control method. 

I loved the shaders and muddy water.

developer_response.body:
****Gamepad and gear VR motion controller added to the new version 1.1****

Thanks so much!!!!

reviews.review_description: Looks good

I had no problems with the game other than being a little short. Was shorter than what I expected....like a lot shorter. 2 hours tops. That is literally the only thing to complain about. Some say light was an issue, but if its that dark its not the way to go...turn around...  Great graphics. A couple times I forgot where I was because I was to into the game and went oh snap...im home in my living room. Definitely kept me wanting more and kept me on edge in a couple spots. I have no idea what goes into making a game , but what was played was done very well. Being that it says prologue I am really hoping something else will come.
Cant wait for part 2
Could be a five but it was too short for me. I enjoyed it though because I love to use my brain and this game does give you a challenge.  Recommended.

Apart from the horrible black smearing I was really impressed with the graphics. (maybe not use true blacks?) I do miss some sort of inventory or menu, and whenever I press run I have the feeling my character is going barely any faster...
It's definitely not as scary as Dreadhalls, but the gameplay is much different.
If glitch is not fixed than this is a huge waste of money, game looks good, but cant walk around.. so just a tease

developer_response.body: We are sorry, but we don't have any reports like this. The game was strongly tested on every model before the launch. Try to restart or reinstall the game. If you solve it, we’d like to know. Thanks anyway

reviews.review_description: The best graphics and immersion, the only  game that scares

developer_response.body: Thanks so much!!!. Your words make us proud.

reviews.review_description:
Graphics were extremely impressive - makes you wonder why other Go games this old and much newer don't look as good as this. Well done!

Locomotion could be improved to increase immersion: something like Eclipse Edge of Light would be a good fit. 

As this game is a couple of years old now, is there any word on the next part or has it been shelved? It would be a real pity if there aren't going to be any more installments!
